label: Gloamvein Cavern
description: Gloamvein Cavern is a deep basalt hollow cut into the rift-scarred escarpments of Cyrenth Vale, its ceilings ribbed with cooling columns and fracture lines vitrified by ancient heat. Bruise-hued auroral light filters through narrow chimneys, casting a perpetual, cold twilight across ash-dusted scree and glassy flowstone. The air carries a metallic tang, and the walls bear soot-blackened niches and tool-scarred ledges that indicate repeated use as a concealed waystation beyond the bastioned enclaves. Intermittent empyrean vibration travels through the rock as a low, steady tremor, defining the cavern’s oppressive acoustics.
